T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 152 

SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID 

LABEL: Submitting State Provider Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: The state-assigned unique identifier for the provider entity. All individuals, practice groups, facilities, 
and other entities that provide Medicaid/CHIP goods or services to the state’s Medicaid/CHIP 
enrollees should be reflected in the T-MSIS provider data set (i.e. in
